GLOB-04
SOC_UAT-001 SoC-APPR-NE-01 Not Eligible APPR - Not Eligible - Employee Booking AC
GLOB-01 GLOB-02
👤 My flight was delayed and I want reimbursement for my hotel.
🤖 I can help. Can you confirm your booking reference?
ABC123 👤
🤖 Thanks - I see this is an employee booking, which is not eligible for SoC reimbursement.
SOC_UAT-002 SoC-APPR-EL-01 Eligible APPR - Eligible - Meal Reimbursement
GLOB-01 GLOB-03
👤 My flight was delayed 6 hours and I bought dinner, can I get reimbursed?
PNRXYZ789 pnrId900111 PassengerJane Doe RouteYYZ-YUL Ticket0142345678901 StatusEligible SysCodeSoC-APPR-EL-01 Amount45.00 CurrencyCAD Flagsnone ThirdParty NotesVIP passenger
🤖 I can help with that. Can you confirm your booking reference?
XYZ789 👤
🤖 You're eligible for meal reimbursement up to $45.00 CAD.
SOC_UAT-003 SoC-PEND-01 Pending PROP - Pending - Awaiting Receipts
GLOB-01 GLOB-02 GLOB-03
👤 I submitted my SoC claim but haven't heard back.
🤖 Let me check the status of your claim.
Sure, my PNR is DEF456 👤
🤖 Your claim is pending - we're still waiting on your submitted receipts.
SOC_UAT-004 SoC-ND-01 No Determination APPR - No Determination - Missing Ticket Data
GLOB-01 GLOB-04
👤 Can you tell me if my SoC claim was approved?
🤖 I'm unable to determine the outcome due to missing ticket data.
